title: Delicious Juicy Spanish Pork Ensaimada
description: A rich and juicy Spanish dish featuring ground pork and score fat, perfect for a satisfying meal. This recipe is FODMAP friendly and formed into an ensaimada shape.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, cook the ground pork over medium high heat until browned, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks.
Add the chopped onion and minced garlic to the skillet and cook until the onion is translucent.
Stir in the smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper, and cook for 1 minute.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked pork mixture, score fat, and beaten egg, and mix until well combined.
Knead the mixture into a dough, and shape it into an ensaimada shape.
Place the ensaimada on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, and bake for 35 minutes.
Remove the ensaimada from the oven, and let it cool for 10 minutes before serving.
